group_1.progressNarration: [textBlack:The two who appeared before us were...@Miss Elisa and Miss Melissa,@legendary Magical Girls who fought@together with La Pucelle Tart...@and also her closest friends.]
[textBlack:Miss Elisa is the daughter of the@Holy Roman Emperor's wife...@Miss Melissa is the daughter of a hero@known by the alias "La Hire."]
[textBlack:Actually, when Miss Perenelle investigated@the Ark, she "requested help" from@the two of them...]
[textBlack:They also happened to enter this@mental world just like us.]
[textBlack:But we didn't know that fact at this time,@and neither did they...]
[textBlack:Besides, even though Torte had@heard about them from Miss Perenelle,@they didn't know about Torte's@existence...]

group_1.textRight: ...What on earth is going on?
I thought it would be hard to pass up
someone who pretends to be Tart,
but she is not just a splitting image of Tart,@she even knows me...?

group_1.textLeft: [chara:831303:effect_emotion_joy_0][se:7222_happy]Yeah! You are Miss Elisa and Miss Melissa, right?
You are the best Magical Girls in Europe.@That's what Mum told me!

group_1.textRight: Nyowahohoho!
That's too much praise...@[chara:402600:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:402600:cheek_0][chara:402600:face_mtn_ex_020.exp3.json][chara:402600:lipSynch_1]No, I mean!
Who are you girls...?

group_1.textLeft: She's Torte...@And I'm Kagome Satori...
Ah, Torte is my nickname.@My real name is Jeanne Flamel!

group_1.textRight: ...Flamel...? What is your mother's name?

group_1.textLeft: It's Perenelle Flamel.

group_1.textRight: [chara:402600:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]Perenelle had a daughter?!
And...she looks just like Tart...?

group_1.textCenter: Well...it seems there's some confusion, but...

group_1.textRight: You can wait for later!

group_1.textLeft: ...Ah, right.
Both of you, just like us,@entered Lord Gilles de Rais' mind
to investigate Tart's memories, right?

group_1.textRight: And because you were mistaken for a revived@or reincarnated Tart,
they were almost dragged into the rebellion...

group_1.textLeft: Well, it's a mental world here,@so it won't be a big deal...
It wasn't a good idea to get separated from@Miss Perenelle, was it...

group_1.textRight: Well, it's fine. I know you guys are allies now.
The remaining problem is...
Lord Gilles de Rais, right?
That man has fallen into madness,@yet he remembers Tart.

group_1.textLeft: He refuses to make eye contact with me...

group_1.textRight: ...He retains his memories,@but he's avoiding facing reality?
It's a bit of a rough treatment...
How about forcibly confronting him with Torte?
I'll go along with you, Torte.
Don't worry, no matter what happens,@I'll protect you.

group_1.textLeft: Yeah, got it!

group_1.textRight: I kept silent in front of Torte, but...
...That man committed unforgivable sins
after Tart's passing.

group_1.textLeft: Sins...?

group_1.textRight: Within his domain, he abducted over a hundred@young boys,
and used them as sacrifices for a dark ritual...

group_1.textLeft: [chara:102001:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!
How...!

group_1.textRight: There's plenty of evidence.
Soon, his crimes will be exposed,@and he will be sentenced to death.
...It's ironic.
Even among those who ventured into death's realm@and lost their memories,
that man alone didn't forget Tart and continued@to worship her more than anyone else.
It seems he's finally regained some sanity.

group_1.textCenter: Why does my Holy Lady have to die?!
If she is truly a Witch, then...
Then I... Then I vow to become a demon and@stand by my Holy Lady again someday!!

group_1.textLeft: Finally back to your senses, I see.
Yes...
He avoided making eye contact with Torte
because he can't face Tart anymore...@That's how he feels, I think.
Everyone was hurt because
of the tragic end of Jeanne d'Arc, right?

group_1.textRight: That's...true for us, too.
This man never lost his memories of Tart,
but he lost something much more precious.

group_1.textLeft: Lord Gilles de Rais has now come to realize his sins...
He will likely be tormented by intense remorse@when he returns to the real world,
but it's not our job to pass judgment on him.

group_1.progressNarration: [textBlack:After this, we quietly left@the mansion and then talked to@Miss Melissa and Miss Elisa@for a bit.]
[textBlack:They once fought alongside Jeanne d'Arc@as her comrades and continued to fight@across Europe for nearly ten years,@carrying on her feelings even after@her passing.]

[textBlack:It must be very, very frustrating@for these two to have Jeanne's memory@disappear from everyone's minds@and to have their former comrades@fight over and over again,@unable to drive England out...]
